items.title: The ultimate Soundbrenner Black Friday guide
items.editorNotes: Revised the HTML for clarity and readability while preserving the original content and links. Removed unnecessary styles and ensured semantic HTML structure.
items.beforeBody:
Best gear to upgrade your setup

Black Friday is the perfect time to elevate your music setup with Soundbrenner’s award-winning tools. Whether you’re a touring musician, passionate practice warrior, or serious music listener, these products will transform how you make and experience music.

#1 Wave in-ear monitors: professional sound in your pocket

Why it’s #1:

If there’s one piece of Soundbrenner gear that deserves a spot in every musician’s arsenal, it’s the Wave in-ear monitors. These dual 10mm dynamic drivers deliver studio-quality sound that rivals professional monitors. With a frequency response of 20Hz–20kHz and up to 36dB of passive noise isolation, you get the clarity and focus you need whether you’re rehearsing in a loud venue or recording in the studio.

What makes Wave essential:

The detachable braided cable means no more worrying about a broken connection ruining your performance. The included silicone and foam ear tips ensure a perfect fit for any ear shape. The robust yet lightweight construction (just 26g total) makes them virtually disappear once you put them in. All that matters is the pristine sound coming through.

Black Friday highlight:

A rare opportunity to experience broadcast-quality monitoring that’s finally accessible to every musician.

#2 Core 2: five tools, one wrist

The Core 2 is the musician’s smartwatch that actually understands what musicians need. It combines five essential tools into one wearable: a vibrating metronome with a powerful haptic pulse, a practice tracker to keep you accountable, a chromatic tuner, a decibel meter to protect your hearing, and full smartwatch functionality for daily life.

Unlike a generic smartwatch, the Core 2 is built specifically for musicians. That vibrating metronome pulse is seven times stronger than your phone’s haptic feedback, so you’ll feel every beat during practice or performance no matter how loud your environment is. The practice tracker provides motivational insights, so you actually look forward to picking up your instrument.

Who should get it:

Serious musicians who want an all-in-one practice companion that also works as their daily watch.

#3 Pulse: the original vibrating metronome

Starting your Soundbrenner journey? The Pulse is your entry point into vibration-based practice. It’s simpler than the Core 2, with no screen and pure haptic feedback, but don’t let that fool you. The Pulse features the same powerful vibrating metronome technology, with seven times stronger vibrations than a smartphone and an impressively long battery life.

Paired with the Soundbrenner app for precise tempo control, the Pulse is flexible for any practice scenario. It’s the perfect way to discover how revolutionary vibrating metronomes are compared to traditional click tracks.

Who should get it:

Musicians who want vibration-based practice without the extra features.

#4 Spark: perfect for young musicians

Meet Spark, the kid-sized version of Soundbrenner’s proven wearable technology. Designed specifically for young musicians, Spark makes practice feel like play. With built-in progress tracking that actually motivates kids (rather than discouraging them), Spark turns music practice into an engaging and rewarding experience.

If you’re a parent, teacher, or mentor looking to inspire the next generation, Spark is the tool that keeps kids excited about learning. It delivers the same powerful vibrating metronome and tuning tools in a design that resonates with younger musicians.

Who should get it:

Parents investing in their child’s music education, private instructors, and music schools looking to make practice more engaging.

#5 Minuendo hearing protection earplugs: the audiophile’s secret

Live music and loud rehearsals are part of a musician’s life, but so is protecting your hearing. Minuendo earplugs solve the biggest problem with traditional hearing protection: they don’t make everything sound muted or unnatural.

Minuendo features a unique membrane design that provides a flat frequency response, so you hear music the way it’s meant to be heard, just quieter. With stepless adjustability, you can dial in the exact protection level you need without awkward jumps in volume. Whether you’re performing, rehearsing, or mixing, Minuendo keeps your ears safe without sacrificing sound quality.

Who should get it:

Musicians and audio professionals who want to protect their most valuable asset, their hearing.

Build your complete Soundbrenner setup this Black Friday

The beauty of the Soundbrenner ecosystem is how seamlessly everything works together. Pair your Wave IEMs with a Core 2 for the ultimate personal monitoring experience. Add Minuendo earplugs for hearing protection during loud sessions. Stack it all with a Soundbrenner Plus subscription to organize your unlimited practice arsenal.

Whether you’re building your first professional setup or expanding an existing collection, now is the perfect time to upgrade your music toolkit.

Shop the Soundbrenner Black Friday collection today and transform your practice.
